---
title: "Learn How to Collaborate with Your Team Members via GitHub"
author: "Luis Berimen"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-expand: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-link: true
    code-tools: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
output-file: index.html
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
---

Luis Berumen
